description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 75% polyester and 25% elastane, with sweat-free technology and branding on left chestFittingMuscleWash care Hand wash separately in 40 degrees Do not bleach Do not use a fabric softner Line dry in shade Do not iron A perfect gym wear, this black t-shirt from quechua wicks away sweat keeping you fresh and dry all day. Wear it to the gym or simply team it with jeans or shorts on a warm day to stay cool and fresh.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5"
